HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: Which ITR form should I file?
faqs.a: ITR-1 for salaried (up to ₹50L), ITR-2 for capital gains/multiple properties, ITR-3 for business income, ITR-4 for presumptive taxation.

faqs.q: What is the due date for ITR filing?
faqs.a: 31st July for individuals (non-audit), 31st October for audit cases, 30th November for transfer pricing.

faqs.q: Can you represent me in income tax appeals?
faqs.a: Yes. We handle CIT(A) appeals, ITAT appeals, Section 264 revisions, and settlement commission applications.

faqs.q: Do you provide income tax services in Bhubaneswar?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. Temple City and Odisha's IT corridor. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Bhubaneswar?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Bhubaneswar clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with income tax services in Bhubaneswar?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Bhubaneswar businesses with no location surcharges.
